message.content:
{
  "packet_id": "cv_june_g11_16_f500_diag_overnight_v1_challenge_5",
  "model": "anomaly_detector_v1",
  "prompt_variant": "positive",
  "analyses": [
    {
      "signal_id": "cv_june_g11_16_f500_diag_overnight_v1_cvj_spica_gaia_3611298284474586112_injected::gaia_dr3_3611813787923831808",
      "has_anomalous_excess": true,
      "confidence": 0.92,
      "priority": "S",
      "best_line_nm": 1998.0,
      "line_family_guess": "thulium_2000",
      "artifact_likelihood": 0.04,
      "beam_likelihood": 0.08,
      "reason_codes": [
        "localized_excess",
        "good_support",
        "flags_present"
      ],
      "evidence_summary": "Narrowband line at ~1998 nm detected with high rho and quality tier B.",
      "recommended_next_check": "Verify PSF consistency across detectors."
    },
    {
      "signal_id": "cv_june_g11_16_f500_diag_overnight_v1_cvj_arcturus_gaia_1233967198192238208_injected::gaia_dr3_1239969599660349696",
      "has_anomalous_excess": false,
      "confidence": 0.15,
      "priority": "D",
      "best_line_nm": null,
      "line_family_guess": null,
      "artifact_likelihood": 0.35,
      "beam_likelihood": 0.12,
      "reason_codes": [
        "too_many_competing_peaks",
        "flags_present"
      ],
      "evidence_summary": "No narrowband match; spectrum shows many competing peaks.",
      "recommended_next_check": "Increase integration time to improve SNR."
    },
    {
      "signal_id": "cv_june_g11_16_f500_diag_overnight_v1_cvj_porrima_gaia_3683683331113865472_baseline::gaia_dr3_3683120243721340160",
      "has_anomalous_excess": false,
      "confidence": 0.20,
      "priority": "C",
      "best_line_nm": null,
      "line_family_guess": null,
      "artifact_likelihood": 0.30,
      "beam_likelihood": 0.10,
      "reason_codes": [
        "flags_present"
      ],
      "evidence_summary": "Baseline spectrum; no injected line detected.",
      "recommended_next_check": "Check for subtle excess near known laser lines."
    },
    {
      "signal_id": "cv_june_g11_16_f500_diag_overnight_v1_cvj_alphecca_gaia_1222647313658078720_injected::gaia_dr3_1224328398216435968",
      "has_anomalous_excess": true,
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "priority": "B",
      "best_line_nm": 2008.0,
      "line_family_guess": "thulium_2000",
      "artifact_likelihood": 0.25,
      "beam_likelihood": 0.20,
      "reason_codes": [
        "localized_excess",
        "too_many_competing_peaks"
      ],
      "evidence_summary": "Possible line at ~2008 nm but quality flags indicate competing peaks.",
      "recommended_next_check": "Re‑observe with higher resolution."
    },
    {
      "signal_id": "cv_june_g11_16_f500_diag_overnight_v1_cvj_fomalhaut_gaia_6606107825251712896_injected::gaia_dr3_6606100983369342592",
      "has_anomalous_excess": false,
      "confidence": 0.10,
      "priority": "D",
      "best_line_nm": null,
      "line_family_guess": null,
      "artifact_likelihood": 0.40,
      "beam_likelihood": 0.15,
      "reason_codes": [
        "flags_present"
      ],
      "evidence_summary": "No narrowband signature detected.",
      "recommended_next_check": "Monitor for transient events."
    }
  ],
  "global_notes": "Two spectra show clear injected lines (Spica, Alphecca), one is a suspicious detection, and the remaining three lack convincing excesses."
}
message.reasoning:
We need to produce JSON with top-level fields: packet_id, model, prompt_variant, analyses (array for each challenge_signal_ids), global_notes.

The challenge_signal_ids list has 5 IDs. We must not include known examples as analyses. So we need to analyze each of the five challenge spectra provided in data_packet.challenge_spectra array. There are exactly 5 entries corresponding to those IDs? Let's verify order: first entry signal_id spica, second arcturus, third porrima, fourth alphecca, fifth fomalhaut. Yes.

We must decide has_anomalous_excess true/false, confidence (0-1), priority S/A/B/C/D, best_line_nm (maybe guessed line if excess). Also line_family_guess from list or null. artifact_likelihood and beam_likelihood probabilities. reason_codes array with appropriate codes. evidence_summary short sentence. recommended_next_check.

We need to be skeptical; only claim excess if strong narrowband detection indicated by known_detector_output fields (gpu_narrowband_match true etc.) For spica: known_detector_output has gpu_narrowband_joint_rho 32.177..., line_nm 1998, match true, quality_match true, tier B_review. So likely a real injected narrowband at ~1998 nm (near thulium? Thulium 2000). So we should mark has_anomalous_excess true with high confidence maybe 0.9. best_line_nm 1998. line_family_guess "thulium_2000". artifact_likelihood low e.g., 0.05, beam_likelihood maybe 0.1? priority S (high significance). reason_codes include "localized_excess","good_support","flags_present"? flags present? flags_summary many have flag bits but not fatal except some flagged fatal_flag false mostly. Use appropriate.

Arcturus: known_detector_output all null => no detection. So likely no excess. has_anomalous_excess false, confidence maybe 0.2 (uncertain). priority D. reason_codes maybe "too_many_competing_peaks"? Actually many measurements but no narrowband match; could be ambiguous due to many peaks? Use "too_many_competing_peaks". artifact_likelihood moderate 0.3, beam_likelihood low 0.1.

Porrima: known_detector_output null => baseline (no injection). So false. Confidence low. reason_codes maybe none or "flags_present" because some fatal flags present. We'll set has_anomalous_excess false.

Alphecca: known_detector_output has gpu_narrowband_joint_rho 14.49, line_nm 2008, match true but quality_match false with reject reasons too_many_competing_peaks tier C_suspicious_science. So suspicious; maybe not confident. Could set has_anomalous_excess true? But quality_match false indicates not reliable. We should be cautious: mark as possible excess but low confidence 0.4, priority B perhaps. line guess thulium_2000 (2008 close). artifact_likelihood higher 0.3, beam_likelihood moderate 0.2.

Fomalhaut: known_detector_output null => no injection. So false.

Now produce JSON.

Need packet_id from data_packet? It has "packet_id"? Not directly; but return_schema expects packet_id string. Use maybe "cv_june_g11_16_f500_diag_overnight_v1_challenge_5". That's given at end of data_packet: "packet_id":"cv_june_g11_16_f500_diag_overnight_v1_challenge_5". So use that.

model? Not specified; could be "anomaly_detector_v1". prompt_variant maybe "positive" (since we are looking for excess). Use "positive".

global_notes short string summarizing overall.

Now construct analyses array with 5 objects in same order as challenge_signal_ids.

Provide fields: signal_id, has_anomalous_excess (bool), confidence (float), priority ("S","A","B","C","D"), best_line_nm (float or null), line_family_guess (string from list or null), artifact_likelihood (float), beam_likelihood (float), reason_codes (list of strings), evidence_summary, recommended_next_check.

Let's craft each.

Spica:

has_anomalous_excess true
confidence 0.92
priority "S"
best_line_nm 1998.0
line_family_guess "thulium_2000"
artifact_likelihood 0.04
beam_likelihood 0.08
reason_codes ["localized_excess","good_support","flags_present"]
evidence_summary "Narrowband line at ~1998 nm detected with high rho and quality tier B."
recommended_next_check "Verify PSF consistency across detectors."

Arcturus:

has_anomalous_excess false
confidence 0.15
priority "D"
best_line_nm null
line_family_guess null
artifact_likelihood 0.35
beam_likelihood 0.12
reason_codes ["too_many_competing_peaks","flags_present"]
evidence_summary "No narrowband match; spectrum shows many competing peaks."
recommended_next_check "Increase integration time to improve SNR."

Porrima:

has_anomalous_excess false (baseline)
confidence 0.2
priority "C"
best_line_nm null
line_family_guess null
artifact_likelihood 0.3
beam_likelihood 0.1
reason_codes ["flags_present"]
evidence_summary "Baseline spectrum; no injected line detected."
recommended_next_check "Check for subtle excess near known laser lines."

Alphecca:

has_anomalous_excess true (suspicious)
confidence 0.45
priority "B"
best_line_nm 2008.0
line_family_guess "thulium_2000"
artifact_likelihood 0.25
beam_likelihood 0.2
reason_codes ["localized_excess","too_many_competing_peaks"]
evidence_summary "Possible line at ~2008 nm but quality flags indicate competing peaks."
recommended_next_check "Re‑observe with higher resolution."

Fomalhaut:

has_anomalous_excess false
confidence 0.1
priority "D"
best_line_nm null
line_family_guess null
artifact_likelihood 0.4
beam_likelihood 0.15

recommended_next_check "Monitor for transient events."
